scripts.dev: nodemon --watch backend/src --exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project backend/tsconfig.json backend/src/server.ts
scripts.dev:backend: nodemon --watch backend/src --exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project backend/tsconfig.json backend/src/server.ts
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:extension
scripts.build:extension: cd extension && npm install && npm run build
